scripts.deploy:dry-run: vp run -r build && vp run --filter @qitu/worker deploy:dry-run
scripts.deploy:preview:dry-run: node scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs preview && vp run -r build && vp run --filter @qitu/worker deploy:preview:dry-run
scripts.deploy:production:dry-run: node scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs production && vp run -r build && vp run --filter @qitu/worker deploy:production:dry-run
scripts.deploy:preview: vp run -r build && vp run --filter @qitu/worker deploy:preview && vp run health:preview
scripts.deploy:production: vp run -r build && vp run --filter @qitu/worker deploy:production && vp run health:production
scripts.smoke: node scripts/i18n-check.mjs && node scripts/smoke.mjs && node scripts/package-interface-tests.mjs && node scripts/worker-integration.mjs
scripts.validate: vp run smoke && vp run -r typecheck && vp check && vp run -r build
scripts.verify:kit: vp run validate && vp run test:worker-runtime && vp run db:migrate:local && vp run smoke:browser
